'''Gin Scraf''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who was one of the earlier settlers of [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]]. She was the aunt of [[Arvid Scraf]] and lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Living in [[Ruby Gulch]], she influenced the [[Newcomer]]s in order to help [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] get a job in [[Hweg Shul]].
